playerClass.name: Fabulist
playerClass.description: Your penchant for writing fables allows you to convert Encounters players may have into Traits that stay with them

playerClass.name: Herald
playerClass.description: Your rank allows you to give new titles to other players

playerClass.name: Scribe
playerClass.description: Your fondness for recording the histories of other adventurers allows you to add Traits to other players

playerClass.name: Bard
playerClass.description: Your skill with spreading a good tale allows you to spread story outcomes to all players, including yourself

stories.prompt: Leathery wings. Fuzzy bodies. Long, curled tails. Fez hats. They swarm together in an impossible number. The sweet smell of bananas follows them.

options.successText: You’re overcome with desire. You lean in for a passionate kiss. But what’s this? The banana pries open your mouth for all the other bananas to enter!

stories.prompt: You see a mirror of the person you were when you were a small child. They cackle at you about your weakness through the whispy darkness of the abyss.

options.successText: You fart into each other’s butts. Back and forth. Forever. You are no longer separate, but one. The echoes of your farts create a chasm in spacetime. All of us in the Lost Lands feel it

stories.prompt: The echo of the Spacetime Fart Incident (SPI as it has become known) forces all of us to face the embarrassment of our old selves. Will you open up?

stories.prompt: A tiny car drives up and behold! Raccoons sneak out of the car… tens at first, then hundreds… wait! THOUSANDS? The raccoons are everywhere!

gameSessionDisplay.mapDescription: Every year it comes. The Dream Walk. The adults all gather at the edge of the wood and usher the youngsters into the darkness of the Lost Lands. The texts left behind by the Gods tell us that the young people who travel into the wood will encounter the characters, creatures, and spirits who will guide them into adulthood. If they manage to make it through the Lost Lands alive they do so as adults. This year, finally, is our year. We hug our parents, clasp our hands together, and we embark.

additions.addedText: You’re overcome with desire. You lean in for a passionate kiss. But what’s this? The banana pries open your mouth for all the other bananas to enter!

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: Leathery wings. Fuzzy bodies. Long, curled tails. Fez hats. They swarm together in an impossible number. The sweet smell of bananas follows them.

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.originalText: You fart into each other’s butts. Back and forth. Forever. You are no longer separate, but one.
submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: You fart into each other’s butts. Back and forth. Forever. You are no longer separate, but one. The echoes of your farts create a chasm in spacetime. All of us in the Lost Lands feel it

additions.addedText: You fart into each other’s butts. Back and forth. Forever. You are no longer separate, but one.

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: You see a mirror of the person you were when you were a small child. They cackle at you about your weakness through the whispy darkness of the abyss.

additions.addedText: The echoes of your farts create a chasm in spacetime. All of us in the Lost Lands feel it

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.originalText: Using the power of magic you summon a chiropractor to assist this woman. Together you and the chiropractor reinforce her back WITH STEEL.
submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: Using the power of magic you summon a chiropractor to assist this woman. Together you and the chiropractor reinforce her back WITH STEEL. It’s unfortunately

additions.addedText: Using the power of magic you summon a chiropractor to assist this woman. Together you and the chiropractor reinforce her back WITH STEEL.

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: Every so often a traveler will meet a woman who, by all rights, should not be able to move under her own power. You offer the name of a chiropractor.

additions.addedText: It’s unfortunately

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: You disarm your child self with a pederastic smile and a wink. They no longer find you amusing.

additions.addedText: You disarm your child self with a pederastic smile and a wink. They no longer find you amusing.

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: You see a mirror of the person you were when you were a small child. They cackle at you about your weakness through the whispy darkness of the abyss.

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.originalText: You compliment... Uh.. her... Strong back. She agrees and rejects the need for a chiropractor!
submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: You compliment... Uh.. her... Strong back. She agrees and rejects the need for a chiropractor! You look around frantically as if trying to make a point to not look at her breasts.

additions.addedText: You compliment... Uh.. her... Strong back. She agrees and rejects the need for a chiropractor!

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: Every so often a traveler will meet a woman who, by all rights, should not be able to move under her own power. You offer the name of a chiropractor.

additions.addedText: You look around frantically as if trying to make a point to not look at her breasts.

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.originalText: The smell, the jingle jangle of the coins. My cheeks became hot. I couldn't help myself... 🥵
submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: The smell, the jingle jangle of the coins. My cheeks became hot. I couldn't help myself... 🥵 The influ

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: You enter the abyss to find nothing but piles and piles a quarters! This can only mean one thing. the Abyss is actually the inside of an arcade machin

additions.addedText: The influ

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: You offer them a drink. They each take a sip and take turns practicing their spit takes. It’s the perfect distraction! You s

additions.addedText: You offer them a drink. They each take a sip and take turns practicing their spit takes. It’s the perfect distraction! You s

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: Leathery wings. Fuzzy bodies. Long, curled tails. Fez hats. They swarm together in an impossible number. The sweet smell of bananas follows them.

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: You strain until you are about to pass out. Then you realize that this isn’t how you open up. Then you realize that you don’t remember how to relax.

additions.addedText: You strain until you are about to pass out. Then you realize that this isn’t how you open up. Then you realize that you don’t remember how to relax.

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: The echo of the Spacetime Fart Incident (SPI as it has become known) forces all of us to face the embarrassment of our old selves. Will you open up?

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: I've learned a thing or two from the flying beasts! Wings sprout from my back as I finish my 10th banana. I take to the air.

additions.addedText: I've learned a thing or two from the flying beasts! Wings sprout from my back as I finish my 10th banana. I take to the air.

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: A tiny car drives up and behold! Raccoons sneak out of the car… tens at first, then hundreds… wait! THOUSANDS? The raccoons are everywhere!

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.originalText: You call upon that Busty Lady from earlier. Your friend helped her after all! She sits on the egg and hatches you out!
submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: You call upon that Busty Lady from earlier. Your friend helped her after all! She sits on the egg and hatches you out!

additions.addedText: You call upon that Busty Lady from earlier. Your friend helped her after all! She sits on the egg and hatches you out!

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: It’s an egg. You’re in the egg. It’s wet in there. And it’s getting warmer. Okay now it’s too hot. Am I being boiled?

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: Glee bbberrrbbb pewpewpewwwwwffffffftsss bahbah boopeepeeop *gulp* pewpewwwww finger guns *gulp* god I’m going to have heartburn tomorrow *

additions.addedText: Glee bbberrrbbb pewpewpewwwwwffffffftsss bahbah boopeepeeop *gulp* pewpewwwww finger guns *gulp* god I’m going to have heartburn tomorrow *

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: Take my hat off and wave them goodbye, with a tear rolling down my cheek Opportunists that they are, one of them swoops down and takes the hat.

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: You use your party's signature ability to Become Wet. The egg cools down and y'know what. It's actually pretty comfortable in here now.

additions.addedText: You use your party's signature ability to Become Wet. The egg cools down and y'know what. It's actually pretty comfortable in here now.

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: It’s an egg. You’re in the egg. It’s wet in there. And it’s getting warmer. Okay now it’s too hot. Am I being boiled?

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: They sigh. At this point, it’s all they can do. They take the bottle, and with one decisive motion, enema the entire bottle.

additions.addedText: They sigh. At this point, it’s all they can do. They take the bottle, and with one decisive motion, enema the entire bottle.

outcomeTypeWithLabel.label: Take my hat off and wave them goodbye, with a tear rolling down my cheek Opportunists that they are, one of them swoops down and takes the hat.

submissionsWithoutParentSubmissions.currentText: I moonlight as a paparazzo, so I pull out my camera and start shooting. The Lost Lands Times will pay a pretty penny for these.

additions.addedText: I moonlight as a paparazzo, so I pull out my camera and start shooting. The Lost Lands Times will pay a pretty penny for these.
